note: Raw diagram-movement magnitude (the SECOND Results currency, distinct from the 3.12x distributional MMD/floor separation). Mean generated-to-real over mean real-to-real H0 sliced-Wasserstein distance, from the cached SW blocks. The real-to-real mean excludes the zero diagonal. This is NOT a saddle fraction: it attributes no share of the divergence to saddle rerouting; it is only a magnitude, which the saddle probe shows D8 rerouting can itself reach.
